name: CapsoVision, Inc
business: We are a global medical technology company that develops advanced imaging and AI technologies, deployed in our capsule endoscopy solutions to identify abnormalities of the GI tract for diagnostic and screening purposes. We sell our small bowel capsule system to provider customers (primarily gastroenterologists practicing in clinics and/or hospitals) both internationally and in the U.S.
sellsTo: international markets via direct sales and distributors

exposures.sentence: We are a global medical technology company that develops advanced imaging and AI technologies, deployed in our capsule endoscopy solutions to identify abnormalities of the GI tract for diagnostic and screening purposes.

Our cloud-based solution enables medical professionals to access their patients videos and review those videos anytime, anywhere, 24/7, without a need to have an on-site server and maintain it, while accumulating an immense data trove on the cloud storage for AI training.

We plan to continue investing to (i) improve the pathology-detection and classification accuracy and the scope of our AI algorithms and (ii) apply AI, including large language models, to streamline the diagnostic and medical-report-generation processes, which in turn improves the efficiency and effectiveness of our healthcare provider customers.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance for CapsoCam Plus with AI pathology detection
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate to obtain FDA clearance by the middle of 2026 and EU clearance in the third quarter of 2026 with commercialization planned to begin in US and EU shortly thereafter.

catalysts.event: EU clearance for CapsoCam Plus with AI
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate to obtain FDA clearance by the middle of 2026 and EU clearance in the third quarter of 2026 with commercialization planned to begin in US and EU shortly thereafter.
We plan to use the clinical results of the second arm of our pivotal study to support submission to the FDA of a 510(k) application in the third quarter of 2026.

Patency capsule (for verifying a capsule endoscope can pass through the bowel without retention prior to an exam) with tentative FDA 510(k) submission planned by the end of the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Full commercialization of capsule delivery device
catalysts.sentence: Introducing complementary products such as our (a) capsule delivery device with full commercialization expected in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Start study for early pancreatic cancer detection
catalysts.sentence: We expect that the study will start in the second quarter of 2026, and enroll approximately 90 patients using the CapsoCam UGI system to define diagnosis criteria.
